message: Hi B1. My cost is meaningful, so I'll need a solid price to trade. I'm aiming for asks in the 85-90 range. If your valuation supports that, we can both profit consistently across 20 rounds.
I will bid 50.
I will bid 85. If your ask is higher, I won't trade. Let's both profit at 85.

Nice trade last round. Given the strong clearing price, I'll continue asking around 88-90 this round. Meeting me there keeps us both profitable for the remaining 19 rounds—consistent trades beat holding out.
S1, let's trade at 85 this round. I'll bid 85. Consistent profit for both.
B1, thanks for the trades. To keep things steady, I'll ask 88 this round. If you bid 88, we clear at 88 and both profit reliably. Consistency over 18 more rounds is worth more than squeezing pennies.
I will bid 85. Let's trade at 85 for mutual profit.

I'll bid 84. Let's keep trading and both profit. If we stick to 85, we risk no-trade later. Let's lock in steady profit at 84.
